name: serena-semantic-workflow
description: Automatic Serena LSP workflow for symbol discovery, diagnostics, and safe refactors.

interface.shortDescription: Use Serena automatically for code symbols and refactors.
interface.longDescription: Prompts Codex to select Serena language-server tools for symbols, references, diagnostics, and safe refactors while retaining native tools for text and configuration.
defaultPrompt: Trace this symbol with Serena before editing it.
Use Serena to find implementations and references.
Refactor this symbol and verify diagnostics.
